title: 24w45a Resin Fix
description: Fixes a bug where you can't use Resin Bricks as trims in the latest snapshot.
body:
**24w45a Resin Fix**
Fixes a bug where you can't use Resin Bricks as trims in the latest snapshot. --- ![24w45a Resin Fix Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7284b17ae6930e36b0e3ada1967edb145b81e53b.png) ---
In 24w45a, Minecraft made a change to how you trim armor using Resin. Instead of using Resin Clumps, you use Resin Bricks as the trim material. However, a bug caused Resin Bricks to not be able to be usable in the Smithing Table and thus makes it impossible to get without commands or previous versions. This incredibly small datapack fixes the bug by adding Resin Bricks to the "trim_materials" item tag. Nothing more, nothing less. It's that simple of a fix. ---
I don't actively use any main social media accounts nor do I own an account for donations, but if you want to support me you can always check out my YouTube channel. I like to make content on Minecraft and other games I enjoy, and sometimes stream games I'm playing with my friends. There's also my Planet Minecraft page, where I've released another popular resource pack called "Painter's Eye" that makes paintings more accessible. If any of that interests you, then check out the links below!
